inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $16.813B less capital spending $7.841B (PaymentsToAcquireOtherPropertyPlantAndEquipment), divided by 899.3M weighted average diluted shares (10-K filed 2026-02-12)
inputs.normalization_note: Owner cash uses cash from operations minus property/plant/equipment capital spending; excludes in-process R&D acquisition payments ($3.008B) and share repurchases ($4.108B) which are separate capital allocation choices

bear.notes: Tirzepatide competition from Novo and oral GLP-1 entrants; IRA pricing pressure; manufacturing bottlenecks cap volume

base.notes: Mounjaro + Zepbound sustain high-teens revenue growth; Trulicity erosion continues; capex moderates after 2027

bull.notes: Oral GLP-1 and Alzheimer's Kisunla add new legs; international obesity penetration; margin leverage on fixed R&D base

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Stockholders equity $26.5B on $112.5B assets; manufacturing PP&E $24.7B reflects real capacity build (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Operating pharma; pipeline valued through R&D spend

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Income before taxes $25.7B FY2025; single reportable segment profitable (10-K)

option_scan.question: Backlog / R&D pipeline not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Kisunla (donanemab) Alzheimer's launch; orforglipron oral GLP-1 Phase 3; retatrutide triple agonist — upside in bull only

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Jardiance collaboration with Boehringer Ingelheim; profit share in cardiometabolic revenue (10-K product table)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Product liability and patent litigation reserves; no dated recovery catalyst (10-K commitments)

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Mounjaro ($22.9B global FY2025) and Zepbound ($13.5B U.S. FY2025) growth already in reported revenue and OCF

growth_explanation.years_1_5: Tirzepatide franchise (Mounjaro diabetes + Zepbound obesity) drives cardiometabolic revenue; Q1 2026 revenue +55.5% YoY; manufacturing capacity coming online.
growth_explanation.years_6_7: Growth normalizes as obesity TAM penetration matures; oncology (Verzenio) and immunology provide mix; oral GLP-1 optionality in bull.
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 product revenue table and Q1 2026 10-Q

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
